allow: Bash(node -e "import\('./backend/src/auth/db.mjs'\).then\(async m => { m.openAuthDb\(\); const u = m.getUserByEmail\('ingve@kampsporthuset.no'\); console.log\('hash:', u.password_hash\); const bcrypt = await import\('bcrypt'\); console.log\('matches ingve2026:', await bcrypt.default.compare\('ingve2026', u.password_hash\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('./backend/src/auth/db.mjs'\).then\(m => { const db = m.openAuthDb\(\); const rows = db.prepare\('SELECT * FROM login_attempts ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20'\).all\(\); console.log\('attempts:', rows.length\); rows.forEach\(r => console.log\(new Date\(r.created_at\).toISOString\(\), r.key\)\); }\)")
